_readme: Set active=true to enable a client. Set active=false to pause without deleting. Mode: automated or draft_approval.

clients.title: CEO
clients.compliance_note: never discuss personal or financial or sensitive information. never discuss medical records never give advice.
clients._target_titles: Physical Therapy clinics, pain management clinics, accounting or legal firms, wealth management firms.
clients._value_prop: We handle your entire outbound prospecting so your team focuses on closing
clients._differentiator: We handle everything - sourcing, writing, sending, and managing replies. Most services hand you a list or a template and walk away. We run the full process under your name, so you only get involved when someone is ready to talk.
clients._outcomes: A full calendar. Consistent meetings with qualified prospects every
clients._voice_sample: Hi [First Name], I came across [Company] and wanted to reach out directly. We work with professional services firms to build a consistent pipeline of new client meetings through targeted outreach - handling everything from list building to managing replies. Most of our clients were relying on referrals alone before working with us. If adding 3-5 qualified conversations per month to your calendar sounds interesting, I'd love to show you how it works. Would a quick call this week make sense?
clients._business_description: ArgusReach is a done-for-you outbound prospecting service for professional services firms. We build targeted lead lists, write personalized email sequences, and manage the full outreach process — from first contact to booked meeting. Our clients focus on closing deals while we fill their pipeline.

sequence.subject: Quick question, {{firstName}}
sequence.body:
Hi {{firstName}}, I came across {{companyName}} and wanted to reach out directly. We work with professional services firms to build a consistent pipeline of new client meetings through targeted outreach - handling everything from list building to managing replies. Most of our clients were relying on referrals alone before working with us. If adding 3-5 qualified conversations per month to your calendar sounds interesting, I'd love to show you how it works. Would a quick call this week make sense?

Vito Resciniti
CEO, ArgusReach

sequence.subject: Re: Quick question, {{firstName}}
sequence.body:
Hi {{firstName}},

Following up on my last note.

We handle everything - sourcing, writing, sending, and managing replies. Most services hand you a list or a template and walk away. We run the full process under your name, so you only get involved when someone is ready to talk.

Happy to walk you through it in 15 minutes if there's any interest.

Vito Resciniti
CEO, ArgusReach

sequence.subject: Last note - {{companyName}}
sequence.body:
Hi {{firstName}},

I'll keep this short - I know your inbox is full.

If building a consistent pipeline of new client meetings ever becomes a priority, feel free to reach out anytime.

Vito Resciniti
CEO, ArgusReach
